dependencies.description:
A cross-platform, open-source build system. CMake is a family of tools
designed to build, test and package software.
dependencies.name: cmake

dependencies.description:
GNU Make is a tool which controls the generation of executables and
other non-source files of a program from the program's source files.
dependencies.name: gmake

dependencies.description:
Ninja is a small build system with a focus on speed. It differs from
other build systems in two major respects: it is designed to have its
input files generated by a higher-level build system, and it is designed
to run builds as fast as possible.
dependencies.name: ninja

dependencies.description:
An AST unparser for Python. This is a factored out version of unparse
found in the Python source distribution; under Demo/parser in Python 2
and under Tools/parser in Python 3.
dependencies.name: py-astunparse

dependencies.description: Color scales in Python for humans.
dependencies.name: py-colorlover

dependencies.description:
Dash is the most downloaded, trusted Python framework for building ML &
data science web apps.
dependencies.name: py-dash

dependencies.description: Bootstrap themed components for use in Plotly Dash
dependencies.name: py-dash-bootstrap-components

dependencies.description: SVG support library for Plotly/Dash
dependencies.name: py-dash-svg

dependencies.description: Plotly graph export library.
dependencies.name: py-kaleido

dependencies.description:
Matplotlib is a comprehensive library for creating static, animated, and
interactive visualizations in Python.
dependencies.name: py-matplotlib

dependencies.description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-numpy

dependencies.description:
pandas is a fast, powerful, flexible and easy to use open source data
analysis and manipulation tool, built on top of the Python programming
language.
dependencies.name: py-pandas

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description: Plot in the terminal using braille dots.
dependencies.name: py-plotille

dependencies.description:
The PyMongo distribution contains tools for interacting with MongoDB
database from Python. The bson package is an implementation of the BSON
format for Python. The pymongo package is a native Python driver for
MongoDB. The gridfs package is a gridfs implementation on top of
pymongo.
dependencies.name: py-pymongo

dependencies.description: PyYAML is a YAML parser and emitter for Python.
dependencies.name: py-pyyaml

dependencies.description: The Python SQL Toolkit and Object Relational Mapper
dependencies.name: py-sqlalchemy

dependencies.description: Pretty-print tabular data
dependencies.name: py-tabulate

dependencies.description: Textual is a Rapid Application Development framework for Python.
dependencies.name: py-textual

dependencies.description: A Textual widget library for picking things in the filesystem
dependencies.name: py-textual-fspicker

dependencies.description: A Textual widget wrapper library for Plotext
dependencies.name: py-textual-plotext

dependencies.description: A Fast, Extensible Progress Meter
dependencies.name: py-tqdm

dependencies.description: The Python programming language.
dependencies.name: python
